title: Evaluating Hut 8 (HUT) After Its US$16 Million River Bend AI Infrastructure Expansion Commitment
description:
Hut 8 (HUT) is in focus after committing about US$16 million to expand the local water system in West Feliciana Parish, Louisiana, in connection with its planned River Bend AI data center campus.
See our latest analysis for Hut 8.
The current US$105.9 share price sits against a very strong recent run, with a 30 day share price return of 37.77% and a year to date share price return of 106.55%. The 1 year total shareholder return is very large at about 7x, which suggests that investors are...
